title: glottiphyllum longum
intro: Glottiphyllum longum, also known as the long-tubed living stone or glottiphyllum, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Aizoaceae. Traditionally, Glottiphyllum longum has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating skin conditions, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. Glottiphyllum longum is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
